title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as the Colosseum fighters, Tontatta rebellion, and Straw Hat alliance move closer to the same target: Doflamingo’s hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What a man!! To defeat such a legend!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The one who brought to heel the fierce battle of C-block... Gladiator Lucy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: for Lucy to have made it this far!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
